title: Understanding the EPA’s Notice on Water Service Line Materials
summary: If you receive a letter from the EPA titled “NOTICE OF UNKNOWN SERVICE LINE MATERIAL – IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT LEAD IN YOUR DRINKING WATER,” The EPA is requiring every water service lines be tested for lead nationwide. The EPA is not claiming that there is lead in your drinking water; and the ci...
